Functions for registering global functions, class constructors, and class functions in JerryScript.

# Purpose
This header file provides a set of functions for registering JavaScript functions and class constructors within the JerryScript engine, specifically for use with the mbed platform. The functions `jsmbed_wrap_register_global_function`, `jsmbed_wrap_register_class_constructor`, and `jsmbed_wrap_register_class_function` allow the user to bind C++ functions to JavaScript global functions, class constructors, and class methods, respectively. Each function takes a name and a handler, where the handler is a function pointer of type `jerry_external_handler_t`, which defines the behavior of the JavaScript function or method. This code is intended to be included in other C++ files that require integration with JerryScript, facilitating the extension of JavaScript capabilities with native C++ functions.
# Imports and Dependencies

---
- `stdlib.h`
- `jerry-core/jerry-api.h`
- `jerryscript-mbed-util/logging.h`
- `jerryscript-mbed-util/wrappers.h`
